name: UA_005: the 'Open an Account' button when entered number is not registered yet should function correctly and redirected to login screen.
fullName: test/specs/authentication/UA_005.e2e.js#Sprint X: Asenso Mobile Version 3 - User Authentication .UA_005: the 'Open an Account' button when entered number is not registered yet should function correctly and redirected to login screen.
description:
the 'Open an Account' button when entered number is not registered yet should function correctly and redirected to login screen.

### Preconditions
1. The login page is accessible.
2. The user account is already registered in the system.
3. The entered one time password (OTP) is incorrect.
descriptionHtml:
the 'Open an Account' button when entered number is not registered yet should function correctly and redirected to login screen.

Preconditions

  1. The login page is accessible.
  2. The user account is already registered in the system.
  3. The entered one time password (OTP) is incorrect.
